message:
data(beads,audit): sync issue tracker state and append audit index entries

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated metadata and status for recently progressed
  beads (evidence lineage transitions, governance path ownership changes)
- audit_index.jsonl: new audit trail entries capturing obligation lifecycle
  traces, recovery governor budget analysis, and websocket close-code
  semantic verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
